_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: Western blot showing Merlin expression in normal human Schwann cells and loss of Merlin expression in schwannomas
details: Successfully detected Merlin expression in normal Schwann cells and HMC, and confirmed loss of Merlin expression in schwannoma and meningioma cells by Western blot
